name: Richard Foxton's Vegetarian Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover lentils with water and cook on a low boil for 1-1/2 hours or until tender.
2. Mash the lentils coarsely.
3. Combine the mashed lentils with the remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into a well-greased loaf pan.
5. Bake, covered, at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes.
6. Remove the cover and continue to cook for an additional 15 minutes or until the loaf is firm to the touch.
7. Serve with your favorite sauce.
